title: Z-Add On Dashboard
subtitle: Staging for new flows, upgrades, and cross-project work before fusion to SKK and RKPK
fusion_policy: Promote to the main HODP only when: Master Register + z_module_manifest entry, structure verify pass, and operator or Zuno checkpoint as you define.

layers.governance: SPI, QOSMEI, predictive, validation, MirrorSoul human loop
layers.cross_project: PC-root registry, EAII, sibling repos (pointers only)

items.title: Predictive intelligence (Phase 5)
items.summary: z_predictive_intelligence.json, PR rail, second QOSMEI pass in Whale Bus.
items.main_hodp: Mini-bot rail + Zuno; optional future panel

items.title: Prediction validation (Phase 5.5)
items.summary: z_prediction_validation.json, PV rail, human-equivalent via MirrorSoul validate.

items.title: MirrorSoul human validation
items.summary: POST /api/mirrorsoul/validate with user_feedback; appends to shared validation history for learning.
items.main_hodp: UI prompts when you add them; API live

items.title: This dashboard (Z-Add On)
items.summary: Data-driven staging surface; edit this JSON to track modules and promotion.
items.main_hodp: Link in Control Centre; not yet on top rail by default

items.title: Z-HeartPulse Engine v1.0 (PREPARE ONLY)
items.summary: Reflection and storytelling lane with strict dignity/consent boundaries. Non-scoring narrative states only.
items.main_hodp: Staging only via Z-Add On; not on main HODP rail
